since_last: 17% of 84 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.60%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 17% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -2.43% · Gold -1.47% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 17% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.60%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.60%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.04%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +9.76%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +9.76%, BIDU +5.22%, AVAV +2.16%, AVGO +2.01%, SPCX +1.87%. Laggards: PLTR -4.11%, NOW -4.08%, MGNI -3.75%, MU -3.71%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.87% at $152.26
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.87% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
